suppress.notes: CVE-2026-39883 and CVE-2026-39882 apply to opentelemetry-go (target_sw=go), not to the Java opentelemetry-semconv artifact. The auto-generated CPE for this jar lacks a target_sw qualifier and incorrectly matches the Go product's CPE range (from 1.15.0 up to, but excluding, 1.43.0).

CVE-2026-53914 is an unsafe deserialization issue in the Kotlin compiler/Gradle build cache metadata handling, not in the kotlin-stdlib runtime jar. This project only depends on kotlin-stdlib transitively via okhttp (OpenTelemetry OTLP exporter) as a runtime library; it never invokes the Kotlin build cache feature described in the advisory.

CVE-2026-54515 (GHSA-5jmj-h7xm-6q6v): case-insensitive deserialization bypass of per-property @JsonIgnoreProperties in jackson-databind. No patched version is available as of 2026-07-01. This project does not use polymorphic deserialization with @JsonIgnoreProperties on security-sensitive fields; exploitability requires specific usage patterns not present here. Suppressed pending upstream fix. Review when jackson-databind >= 2.19.x releases a patch.
